hyperedges.label: AI Slide Generation Tool Comparison (7 tools)
hyperedges.source_file: docs/20260107-AIスライド生成ツール7種徹底比較-ChatGPT-Gemini-NotebookLM-Copilot.html
hyperedges.description: Seven AI slide generation tools compared including ChatGPT, Gemini, NotebookLM, Copilot, Irusiru, Claude, and Genspark. Genspark rated highest overall.

hyperedges.label: Anthropic Model Hierarchy: Haiku < Sonnet < Opus < Mythos
hyperedges.description: Anthropic's Claude model lineup follows a naming hierarchy from Haiku (lightweight) through Sonnet and Opus to Mythos (most powerful, not yet public).

hyperedges.label: Google Full-Stack AI Pipeline: Stitch + Jules + AI Studio
hyperedges.description: Google's AI development ecosystem integrates Stitch (frontend UI generation), Jules (backend coding agent), and AI Studio (vibe coding/build mode), all powered by Gemini models. Project Genie uses AI Studio for vibe coding.
